name: Cinnamon Ornaments#1
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix 3/4 to 1 cup of applesauce with 4.12 ounces of ground cinnamon until a stiff dough forms.
2. Roll the dough to a thickness of 1/4 inch.
3. Cut shapes using cookie cutters.
4. Make a hole for ribbon on each ornament.
5. Allow the ornaments to dry several days, turning occasionally.
